evals.name: symfony-validator-refactor
evals.prompt: /create-issue Use Symfony Validator on FlightController instead of individual validations.
evals.expected_output: A well-formed GitHub issue with Background/User Story/Acceptance Criteria/Tasks sections, grounded in the actual FlightController.php validation code, labeled enhancement.
expectations: Body contains a '## Background' heading
Body contains a '## User Story' heading
Body contains a '## Acceptance Criteria' heading with checkbox ('- [ ]') items
Body contains a '## Tasks' heading with checkbox ('- [ ]') items
User Story follows 'As a ..., I want ..., so that ...' shape
Issue was actually created (issue_url.txt has a valid github.com issues URL)
Issue has the 'enhancement' label applied
